Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenSeasonalAnomalyDetection

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.seasonal.impl.ViewRiksdagenSeasonalAnomalyDetection
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity public class ViewRiksdagenSeasonalAnomalyDetection extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
The Class ViewRiksdagenSeasonalAnomalyDetection. Database view for seasonal anomaly detection with multi-dimensional classification.
